summary_context: Added frontend caching (staleTime: 5 mins) for the backlog list in list.tsx and query invalidation for 'daily-report-backlog' in index.tsx upon daily report submission to optimize tab transition latency. Deleted unused legacy daily reports page frontend/src/pages/daily-reports/new.tsx. Updated frontend/src/pages/daily-reports/index.tsx to calculate remainingStaleTime dynamically on every render. Removed redundant useTaskCacheStore tasksInCache check inside the tasks useQuery queryFn to resolve caching bugs.
